---
title: "_Featherlight_ Design Team"
---

_Featherlight_ is the work of a small but dedicated team and an **invaluable** set of playtesters. This website will try to list everyone but please reach out to the design team lead if you feel that your contributions are not properly recognized!

::::{.columns}
:::{.column width="49%"}
### Design Lead

Nick J Lyon -- [{{< fa globe >}}](https://njlyon0.github.io/)

### Artists

- Galactic Spiral Characters: **Sami Briggs** -- [{{< fa globe >}}](https://samibriggs.carrd.co/)
- Adirilan Characters: **TBD**
- Setting Splash Pages: **TBD**
- _Featherlight_ Logo: **Gabriel De La Rosa**  -- [{{< fa globe >}}](https://www.gabrieldelarosa.com/)

:::
:::{.column width="2%"}
:::
:::{.column width="49%"}
### Additional Design & Editing

Angela Bunning, Brittany Cavazos, Ky Cofield, Wade Dismukes, Erica Holdmore, Josh Justison, Will Ruman, Gus Thies

#### Alpha Playtesters

Angela Bunning, Bekka Cavazos, Tori Cavazos, Ky Cofield, Wade Dismukes, Marcy Palomino, Declan Price
:::
::::
